I did set up the sandbox.
So, you know, that can be used to test those web hooks and stuff.
But I did have a question kind of about how much I wasn't sure if we were going to put the exact, like, bullet points of what features are in one tier versus the other.
Or if we wanted to just have a general description of that.
So I didn't know how granular we wanted to have that because we did decide to use, like, the Stripe.
Yeah, the core thing here, right, is 14 days.
Anything past 14 days, the free version should not have, right?
And the easiest way to...
Implement that.
Again, not a blocker to launch, but it's like, it should be a very fast follow.
But ideally, it's very similar to like Crunchbase and others, where everywhere that filter is, there's a lock button.
And if you click that lock button, it takes you to the upgrade, you know, screen.
And so that's one.
And then the second one is around how many custom prompts.

And so in my original prototype, I don't know if y'all remember, there was like a place at the top, close to where the filters are, that was constantly showing you like how many custom prompts you were using and how many you had.
That's the simplest way to do it.
That's how Peak AI does it and a few others.
And again, like that is not a blocker to launch either.
But so the MVP here is for us to communicate those things, which is in the pricing and monetization doc.
And even if at first, like we don't have a lot of like upgrade triggers everywhere.
Just have it there and putting some limits behind the scenes.
And then later on, we can have a better way to communicate where those two things are.
There are more features, but some of the ones that I had put in the free versus pro are not yet live or might not be relevant quite yet.
Those are the two main ones.
Maybe we lock just on like free is 14 days and 50 prompts of all the same engines.
And then pro is the 500 prompts?
Yeah, it's 500 prompts.
And ideally, there is like some engine that we're reserving for pro that we have.
Because if it's like free, you have all of them.
And so the two places where that's relevant is when you go into the details, you shouldn't be able to see more.
And that's a great upgrade trigger.
And always remove, you know.
Yeah.
Just to simplify, probably just because we have to build the gates and all that for the payment, for the plans.-bye.-bye.-bye.
If we just go with all the providers now and then we remove from the free forward, just to simplify the execution on the code side.
Yeah.
Again, none of this is like we need to block right now.
It's the main thing.
It's just not letting people add more than 50.
That is important.
We have that.
Yeah.
Yeah.
That happens all on the back end.
was more talking about like the front end of like what users see in the Stripe checkout.
Stripe to define the features and when you define the plans.
Yeah.
I had in my prototype on monetization or the signup flow, I think I had a couple of some copies that I used.
But if you give me just a placeholder, how many characters and screens, Stevie, I can work on the copy for that.
Okay.
Yeah.
Great.
I can look at your video too.
I didn't remember that that was in there.

Yeah, like some of the, in the onboarding and sign up doc in Notion, like the, like some of those I had, like there's some copy there around the CTAs and things that are also relevant for the, but I'll adapt it.
So if you just tell me like, hey, this is where like the text goes, you know, and what it looks like is, Stripe's kind of weird on the upgrade.
They don't give you like a free form, you know, I think they might have bullets, but it's a very short thing.
I know because like when I was charging for the workshops, like it's a very limited little window.
Yeah, it's like description and it doesn't like you can't.
like a table or something.
So it's mostly like, it's a mini elevator pitch to just like get people to check out, you know, so you don't want to overwhelm people.
It's mostly like, hey, you're getting, you're going to get a lot of value.

Can you add Leo to this meeting moving forward?

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Daily standup to sync on progress, blockers, and priorities for the upcoming launch.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Critical Bug Fix (Ticket \#549):** Jose is fixing a bug where UI updates (e.g., changing competitors) require a manual refresh. The fix, due today, will show a "working on it" message during the 45–60 second data backfill.
  - [**Probing Data Integrity:** The team will defer a full retry/validation system for launch. Instead, the immediate focus is on preventing systemic data failures (e.g., blank results from core services) that erode user trust.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [**Billing MVP Defined:** The launch MVP will use Stripe Checkout for a simple payment link experience. Free plan limits are set at 14 days of data history and 50 custom prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2183.0)
  - [**New Standup Process:** A live Notion doc will be used to capture action items and key decisions, ensuring critical points are not lost in automated transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Topics

### Standup Process & Note-Taking

  - [**Goal:** Use standups for quick status updates and surfacing blockers, not for deep problem-solving.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**Action Items:** Must be captured live in a Notion doc to avoid losing critical information from automated transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

### Data Integrity & Probing

  - [**Problem:** Systemic data failures (e.g., blank results from core services like ChatGPT) erode user trust by showing impossible or incorrect data.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [**Solution:** Defer a full retry/validation system for launch. The immediate priority is preventing systemic failures.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
      - [**Action:** Create a ticket for a manual review of key workspaces (Augment, Brax) to find and report systemic data issues.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [**Data Latency:** The app's data is based on yesterday's probes, with a potential 2-day delay during the Europe morning.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
      - [**Action:** Improve UI/UX to clearly communicate this data latency to users.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)

### Ticket \#549: UI Refresh Bug

  - **Problem:** Ticket \#549 is a complex, multi-part bug causing UI updates to require a manual refresh.
  - [**Fix (Jose):** A backfill process will run when users change competitors, taking 45–60 seconds. A "working on it" message will be displayed during this time.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - **Action:** Break Ticket \#549 into smaller, more manageable tickets.

### Development Updates

  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
      - [**Completed:** Backfill plumbing for UI updates.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - [**Concern:** Infrastructure strain from data volume. Pedro's recent work on snapshotting has reduced this risk, but Jose will monitor it.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [**Completed:** Snapshotting optimization and prompt refactor.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [**Next:** Add pagination to the Overview page's comparators list.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
      - [**Action:** Create a ticket to implement Brandfetch colors in charts, which is a key visual improvement for readability.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)
      - [**Completed:** Competitor suggestion logic improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
      - [**In Progress:** Company context and persona generation in the onboarding flow.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
      - [**Next:** Draft the Billing RFC.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
          - [**Reference:** Use the simple payment link experience from `mentions.so` as a model for the MVP.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

### Billing & Monetization

  - [**MVP Plan:** Use Stripe Checkout for a simple, external payment link experience.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**Free Plan Limits:**](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)
      - [14 days of data history.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
      - [50 custom prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)
  - [**Pro Plan:** 500 custom prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [**Engine Access:** All engines will be available to free users at launch to simplify execution. Engine-gating will be a fast-follow feature.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [**Action:** Marcel will provide copy for the Stripe checkout page once Stevie provides character limits.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2377.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
      - Complete the UI backfill fix (Ticket \#549) by EOD today.
      - Break Ticket \#549 into smaller tickets.
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [Add pagination to the Overview page's comparators list.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)
      - [Complete onboarding flow work today.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
      - [Draft the Billing RFC.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)
      - [Create a ticket for the manual review of key workspaces to find systemic data issues.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
      - [Provide character limits for the Stripe checkout page copy.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2377.0)
      - [Add Leo to future standup invites.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2450.0)
  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2377.0)
      - [Provide copy for the Stripe checkout page.](https://fathom.video/share/8pqroG4xDM1JEV4UqSaFBPpWhrCSHyih?tab=summary&timestamp=2377.0)

action_items.description: Create Notion doc for standup notes; share w/ team
Break out ticket 549 into smaller tickets
Raise data-volume/infra concerns in tomorrow's standup
Create Linear issue: use Brandfetch colors in charts
Create Linear issue: validate probes/prompts across key workspaces w/ Leo
Review mentions.so billing flow; draft RFC for billing
Send Stripe Checkout copy constraints to Marcel; Marcel drafts copy
Add Leo to future standup invites
